overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval village at night. The character moves along a dirt path past wooden huts and fences, approaching a burning campfire and stone archway under dark stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path between medieval wooden huts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the village path with swords sheathed on his back, moving toward the distant firelight

entered.detail: rustic log cabin with dark wooden walls and sloped roof
tall wooden stake fence lining the path
traditional peasant house with steep thatched roof
distant campfire providing orange glow in the darkness
stone bridge structure visible in the far distance
crude wooden logs and planks blocking part of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path between wooden village structures under a dark stormy sky. The path is flanked by a log hut on the left and wooden fencing on the right, with a distant campfire and stone archway visible ahead.

events.description: firelight from burning brazier becomes prominent and illuminates the path with warm orange glow

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past wooden barricades toward the central campfire area

entered.detail: wooden well with bucket and support beams near the fire

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the village center, the campfire grows larger and casts flickering orange light across the path. The wooden hut recedes to the left while a rustic well appears near the fire on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: village exit approaching stone archway bridge

events.description: passing the campfire area and approaching the stone archway structure at the village edge

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone archway exit while moving past the campfire on the right

entered.detail: wooden support beams and gate structure near the archway

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the campfire and well on the right, moving toward a large stone archway that marks the village exit. The wooden structures of the village fall behind as the character approaches the bridge structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark medieval village that transitions from a narrow residential path to an open stone exit. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by a log hut and wooden fencing under a stormy sky, with a distant campfire flickering ahead. As he approaches the village center, the orange glow of the fire intensifies and expands across the path, while a rustic well emerges on the right as the initial wooden structures recede. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes the campfire and well, leaving the village huts behind to move toward a large stone archway. Finally, the camera follows him through the archway and toward a bridge structure that marks the edge of the settlement.
